dataset: Google Earth Pro / Ildefons Cerdà 1859 Plan for Barcelona Eixample

pi_items.source: Wikipedia (Cerdà Plan), Museum of the City of New York

privileged_info_summary: The target city block in Barcelona's Eixample district is located at approximately 41.3895°N, 2.1575°E. Based on the historical 1859 Cerdà Plan, these blocks are octagonal with 8 vertices due to 45-degree chamfered corners. The standard block dimension is 113.3 meters per side, and the typical area of such a block is approximately 12,370 square meters.
